hero.eyebrow: Professional Karate and Fitness Training in Santacruz
hero.heading: Build Discipline, Strength and Confidence Through Karate
hero.description: Structured Karate, fitness and practical self-defence programmes for children, teenagers, adults and women. Train in a safe, supportive and motivating environment with experienced instructors.
trustPoints: Separate batches for different age groups

image.alt: Karate instructor training students at OliveHorse Fitness Academy

about.heading: More Than Karate Training
description: OliveHorse Fitness Academy is a professional Karate and fitness training academy based in Santacruz, Mumbai.
Our programmes help students improve physical fitness, practical self-defence, discipline, confidence, flexibility, coordination and overall personality development.
Whether a student is beginning their first Karate class or preparing for a belt examination or competition, every programme follows a clear and progressive training structure.

image.alt: Students practising Karate at OliveHorse Fitness Academy

programmesPreview.heading: Find the Right Programme for Your Goals
programmesPreview.description: Choose structured Karate, self-defence and fitness training based on age, experience and personal goals.

benefits.heading: Skills That Support Life Inside and Outside the Academy
benefits.description: Karate develops physical ability, mental focus and personal confidence through consistent, structured training.

items.title: Discipline and Focus
items.description: Develop better concentration, consistency, patience and respect through structured practice.

items.title: Practical Self-Defence
items.description: Learn simple, responsible and effective techniques for greater personal safety and awareness.

items.title: Strength and Fitness
items.description: Improve endurance, balance, mobility, coordination and overall physical conditioning.

items.title: Confidence
items.description: Build self-belief by learning new skills, overcoming challenges and tracking progress.

items.title: Flexibility and Coordination
items.description: Develop better movement control, posture, reflexes and body awareness.

items.title: Personal Development
items.description: Strengthen responsibility, resilience, teamwork and a positive approach to improvement.

ageGroups.heading: Training Designed Around the Student
ageGroups.description: Each batch is planned according to age, physical ability, experience and learning pace.

groups.title: Children
groups.description: Fun and structured Karate sessions that improve discipline, concentration, coordination, confidence and physical activity.

groups.title: Teenagers
groups.description: Focused Karate and fitness training designed to develop strength, confidence, flexibility, self-defence skills and healthy habits.

groups.title: Adults
groups.description: Beginner-friendly Karate, fitness and self-defence sessions that improve movement, endurance, confidence and stress management.

groups.title: Women
groups.description: Practical self-defence and awareness training in a safe, supportive and respectful environment.

instructor.heading: Professional Guidance at Every Stage
instructor.name: Pravin Nawale
description: Pravin Nawale leads the academy with a disciplined, encouraging and student-focused approach.
His training programmes are designed to help students build strong foundations, improve technique and progress confidently through each stage of their Karate journey.
Students receive clear instruction, practical feedback and individual attention in a safe training environment.
credentials: Training for beginners through advanced learners

image.alt: Pravin Nawale, founder and head instructor of OliveHorse Fitness Academy

schedule.heading: Choose a Batch That Fits Your Routine
schedule.description: Weekday and weekend batches are available. Final batch allocation depends on age, experience level and current availability.
schedule.notice: Contact the academy to confirm the latest timings before visiting.

batches.availability: Book at least 48 hours in advance

pricing.heading: Start with a Free Trial Class
pricing.description: Experience the training environment, meet the instructor and identify the most suitable programme before enrolling.
pricing.registrationNote: A one-time registration fee of ₹500 applies after enrolment.

plans.name: Trial Class
plans.description: Experience a class before selecting a programme.

plans.name: Kids Group Classes
plans.description: Structured Karate training for children in age-based batches.

plans.name: Teen and Adult Classes
plans.description: Karate, fitness and practical self-defence training.

plans.name: Private Coaching
plans.description: One-to-one training based on personal goals and experience.

plans.name: School and Corporate Workshops
plans.billing: Based on group size and format
plans.description: Custom self-defence, fitness and safety workshops for organisations.

progressJourney.heading: A Clear Path from Beginner to Advanced Training
progressJourney.description: Students progress through structured stages based on attendance, technique, discipline, fitness and readiness.

steps.title: Free Trial and Assessment
steps.description: Meet the instructor, experience a class and identify the right batch and programme.

steps.title: Foundation Training
steps.description: Learn posture, movement, basic strikes, blocks, fitness exercises and training discipline.

steps.title: Skill Development
steps.description: Improve technique, coordination, flexibility, stamina, Kata and controlled partner practice.

steps.title: Belt Progression
steps.description: Prepare for regular assessments and belt examinations through structured practice.

steps.title: Advanced or Competition Training
steps.description: Progress towards advanced grades, black belt preparation or competitive Karate.

gallery.heading: Training, Progress and Achievement
gallery.description: See how students learn, practise, improve and celebrate their progress at OliveHorse Fitness Academy.

images.alt: Students participating in a Karate belt examination

testimonialsSection.heading: Progress That Students and Families Can See
testimonialsSection.description: Read how structured training has helped students develop confidence, fitness, discipline and practical skills.

faqSection.heading: Everything You Need to Know Before Starting
faqSection.description: Find answers about age groups, experience levels, uniforms, trial classes, fees and training schedules.
